creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
For future updates, consider using something

github.com/crowdsecurity/go-cs-lib/version.Version=${DISTVERSIONPREFIX}${PKGVERSION}-freebsd

as to pick up PORTREVISION and PORTEPOCH updates.  Not a requirement, but that may make interpreting bug reports easier in case the port is changed without an update to the software (e.g. due to toolchain changes).
